title: Cobblemon: Cubic Pokeballs
description: Gives the Pokeballs a square & blocky front-facing style, intended to be used with Golden Days Base and Programmer art Packs to match with a Beta Aesthetic
body:
Requires the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod as this retextures their Pokeballs specifically ...

this Texture Pack aims to make the Pokeballs from Cobblemon way more square and front facing, while it's intended to make them feel like they're from _Beta v1.7.3_ with the help of packs like [Golden Days Base](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days) it can totally be used standalone for people who enjoy the blocky aesthetic!

# Pack Contents

![All the cobblemon pokeballs displayed with their new textures inside of a large chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78d628c145536f7e77a29969d994fc9a4bb42459.png)

<details>
<summary>Textured</summary>

- Poké Ball
- Verdant Ball
- Azure Ball
- Citrine Ball
- Slate Ball
- Roseate Ball
- Premier Ball
- Cherish Ball
- Great Ball
- Ultra Ball
- Master Ball
- Fast Ball
- Sport Ball

- Quick Ball
- Love Ball
- Dream Ball
- Heal Ball
- Heavy Ball
- Moon Ball
- Dive Ball
- Net Ball
- Lure Ball
- Nest Ball
- Dusk Ball
- Safari Ball
- Park Ball
- Friend Ball
- Level Ball
- Luxury Ball
- Beast Ball
- Ancient Balls


</details>


<details>
<summary>License Permissions</summary>

You're allowed to:
- Use this Pack in your Videos and Streams
- Include this Pack in your Modrinth Modpack as long as you set the Pack as an "Embedded" dependancy in every version it's included in

For more information you can ask in the [Support Server](https://discord.gg/6eNumFsbH3) for permissions...

</details>



# [Mole Co.⛏](https://discord.gg/6eNumFsbH3) - Content
